title: Lock v0.3 visual identity plan
reason: Lock the v0.3 visual identity and README pamphlet direction explicitly in the planning contract before compiling the downstream prompt.
proposed_changes: Make the README pamphlet visual direction explicit: local deterministic SVG hero, Markdown product copy, and claim-safe Korean companion.
Record SVG bans for emoji, foreignObject, external fonts, external references, and long text.
Treat remote capsule-style renderers as inspiration only and link visual regression checks to README/assets.
risk_impact: Adds an explicit high-severity visual identity risk with mitigation, strengthening rather than weakening existing packaging controls.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because CAP-017 keeps accepted requirements, evaluations, mitigated high risks, artifacts, non-goals, and no blocker questions.
